violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth bucket sanitizing solution testing low. Bucket full of wiping cloths. Change solution as needed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need detail cleaning under/behind refrigeration equipment.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Wall at 3 tub sink and behind wire rack shelving near BOH white refrigerator showing wear. Peeling paint.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
